CVE-2022-41325.title: An integer overflow in the VNC module in VideoLAN VLC Media Playe ...
CVE-2022-41325.description: An integer overflow in the VNC module in VideoLAN VLC Media Player through 3.0.17.4 allows attackers, by tricking a user into opening a crafted playlist or connecting to a rogue VNC server, to crash VLC or execute code under some conditions.

CVE-2023-47359.title: Videolan VLC prior to version 3.0.20 contains an incorrect offset ...
CVE-2023-47359.description: Videolan VLC prior to version 3.0.20 contains an incorrect offset read that leads to a Heap-Based Buffer Overflow in function GetPacket() and results in a memory corruption.

CVE-2023-47360.title: Videolan VLC prior to version 3.0.20 contains an Integer underflo ...
CVE-2023-47360.description: Videolan VLC prior to version 3.0.20 contains an Integer underflow that leads to an incorrect packet length.

CVE-2024-46461.title: VLC media player 3.0.20 and earlier is vulnerable to denial of se ...
CVE-2024-46461.description: VLC media player 3.0.20 and earlier is vulnerable to denial of service through an integer overflow which could be triggered with a maliciously crafted mms stream (heap based overflow). If successful, a malicious third party could trigger either a crash of VLC or an arbitrary code execution with the target user's privileges.
